text: NammaYatri is a game changer for BLR. No commission means drivers are actually happy!
Waited 20 mins for a ride at Indiranagar. GPS was jumping everywhere. #NammaYatri
Love the yellow and blue branding. Much better than the competitors.
Driver took the long way but didn't complain once. Love the direct pay feature.
Why is the app so much faster than Uber? #TechInOoru #NammaYatri
Direct to driver payment is the way. Cutting out middleman commissions.
Can we get NammaYatri for cabs too? The auto experience is so much better.
The metro integration needs work. Hard to find the auto at Majestic exit.
Happy driver = Happy ride. Support local tech!
The app crashed twice near Silk Board. Anyone else?
